CustomField.description: True when this file is an appendix, attachment, or citation supplement rather than core NEPA document text. FRA page limits (EA = 75, Draft EIS = 150, Final EIS = 300) explicitly exclude appendices. This flag is the basis for the FRA Page Limit Compliance Report: core text files count against the limit; appendices do not.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Appendices and citation supplements are excluded from FRA page limits. Check this for any file that is not core document text.
CustomField.label: Is Appendix / Supplement
